description: Normalised voice-prosody features emitted by the PROSODY pipeline stage (#1119). Consumed by AGGREGATE — general signals → BehaviorParameter deltas (CONV_PACE, pace_indicators); IELTS signals → CallScore rows on the 4 IELTS speaking skill parameters. Also available for ADAPT / COMPOSE downstream readers via the registry.

storage.description: Persisted on Call.voiceProsody as the forensic receipt. The live pipeline signal is this contract envelope; the column is the audit trail.

mode.description: Scoring mode used by the vendor — drives downstream consumption.

ieltsScores.description: IELTS Speaking band scores (0.0–9.0). Only present when mode === 'ielts'. Sub-scores map to skill_fluency_and_coherence_fc, skill_lexical_resource_lr, skill_grammatical_range_and_accuracy_gra, skill_pronunciation_p when AGGREGATE writes CallScore rows.

generalSignals.description: Generic voice signals not tied to an IELTS rubric — only present when mode === 'general'. paceWpm → CONV_PACE, hesitationRate → pace_indicators. confidenceProxy is emitted but has no BehaviorParameter consumer in #1119 (needs a learner-facing parameter to land first).

errorReason.description: Only present when mode === 'unavailable'. Distinguishes the failure mode so downstream stages can decide whether to retry, log, or silently skip.

rawVendor.description: Unmodified vendor response. Forensic only — never read in shared code (promote to a canonical field if any consumer beyond a one-off needs it).

thresholds.description: Timeout budget for the vendor scoring call. Override per-installation via VoiceSystemSettings.vendorTimeoutMs. 30s leaves headroom inside Cloud Run's 60s request budget.

notes: PROSODY produces this contract — fetches Call.stereoRecordingUrl, calls the configured SpeechAssessmentProvider, normalises the vendor response, persists to Call.voiceProsody, emits the contract.

AGGREGATE consumes this contract — writes 4 CallScore rows for IELTS skill parameters (mode==='ielts') OR BehaviorParameter deltas on CONV_PACE + pace_indicators (mode==='general'). mode==='unavailable' → AGGREGATE skips all prosody-dependent writes.

Idempotency: if Call.voiceProsody is already populated AND the pipeline isn't running with force=true, PROSODY returns the existing contract WITHOUT calling the vendor. Guards against per-minute re-payment on admin 'rerun' clicks.
Sim-safe: Call.stereoRecordingUrl === null → mode === 'unavailable', errorReason === 'no_recording', pipeline continues normally.

Failure modes do NOT abort the pipeline. Vendor 5xx → mode === 'unavailable', errorReason === 'vendor_error'. Vendor timeout → errorReason === 'vendor_timeout'. AGGREGATE skips prosody writes; other stages run unaffected.
